title: sterculia cognata
intro: Sterculia cognata is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae, commonly known as the sterculia tree. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sterculia cognata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Sterculia cognata include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
